name: secure-redact
title: Secure Redact
description: 100% offline data redaction for sensitive information
author: husnainfareed

preferences.name: defaultPolicy
preferences.title: Default Detection Policy
preferences.description: Which categories of patterns to scan for

preferences.name: enableAudit
preferences.title: Audit Log
preferences.label: Record redaction stats locally
preferences.description: Stores aggregate stats (no input/output text) in the local audit log

commands.name: redact-clipboard
commands.title: Redact Clipboard
commands.subtitle: Sanitize clipboard content in place
commands.description: Detects and redacts sensitive data in clipboard without opening UI

commands.name: redact-paste
commands.title: Redact & Paste
commands.subtitle: Sanitize and paste to active app
commands.description: Redacts sensitive data from clipboard and pastes clean text

commands.name: workbench
commands.title: Open Workbench
commands.subtitle: Full editor with live preview
commands.description: Interactive editor to review and redact text with detection details

commands.name: audit
commands.title: Audit Log
commands.subtitle: View redaction history
commands.description: Dashboard showing aggregate statistics and redaction history

commands.name: feeds
commands.title: Threat Feeds
commands.subtitle: Custom pattern management
commands.description: Manage custom threat feeds and patterns for enhanced detection

commands.name: settings
commands.title: Settings
commands.subtitle: Manage local data
commands.description: Manage local storage and view privacy details
